abstract.text: This class is inherited by all Pro services and also

This article describes the KeyboardKit callout engine.

used to perform keyboard-related callout actions.
Pro callout services don’t trigger feedback.

KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
